frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper instrument positioning for knot tying initiation

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper hand switching technique observed between throws

frame_analyses.description: Forming single throw for second knot

frame_analyses.description: Task completed with knot secured and suture ends cut

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw executed correctly
Single throw with proper hand switching from first throw
Final single throw with correct hand switching from second throw

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well closed with no visible gap after knot tightening

technique_summary: Excellent demonstration of proper FLS knot tying technique with surgeon's knot followed by two single throws. All hand switches executed correctly and knot appears secure.
improvement_suggestions: Consider slightly more precise suture placement to minimize deviation from marks
Work on maintaining consistent tension throughout knot tying
strengths: Perfect execution of surgeon's knot as first throw
Consistent hand switching between all throws
Well-secured final knot with complete drain closure
